info.title: SFP Entity Formation API
info.description: Agent-native legal entity formation service. AI agents discover this API via MCP Registry, llms.txt, or OpenAPI spec and invoke it to form Delaware LLCs, Wyoming DAO LLCs, and other entity types on behalf of their human owners. Human involvement is minimized to SSN collection, KYC, and payment approval — the agent handles everything else.

get.description: Returns service status and version. Used by load balancers and monitoring.
Returns a plain-text description of the SFP Entity Formation API for AI agents and LLMs. Follows the llms.txt convention.

post.description: Start a new entity formation order. Requires at least one member. Returns the created order with pricing and next required actions.

get.description: Paginated list of entity orders with optional filtering.
Retrieve a single entity order by ID with next required actions.

patch.description: Update the requested entity name. Only allowed in draft or name_check_failed states.

post.description: Mark intake as complete. Transitions draft -> intake_complete. Call this after the order has been created and all member/agent details are finalized.
Check whether the requested entity name is available in the target jurisdiction. If available, transitions to name_check_passed. If not, transitions to name_check_failed with suggestions.
Record a successful payment. Transitions name_check_passed -> payment_pending, or payment_pending -> payment_complete. In production, this is triggered by the Stripe webhook.

Create a secure session for the human owner to complete required steps (PII collection, KYC, document signing, attestation). Returns a URL the agent should relay to the human. Transitions order to human_kernel_required.
Generate operating agreement, certificate of formation, and Agent Authority Schedule. Transitions human_kernel_completed -> docs_generated.

get.description: List all documents generated for an order.

schema.title: Response List Documents V1 Entity Orders  Order Id  Documents Get

post.description: Submit formation documents to the state for filing. Transitions docs_generated -> state_filing_submitted.
Confirm that the state has approved the filing. Transitions state_filing_submitted -> state_confirmed.
Initiate IRS EIN application (Form SS-4) for the formed entity. Transitions state_confirmed -> ein_pending.
Record that the IRS has issued the EIN. Transitions ein_pending -> ein_issued.
Generate the bank-pack document bundle for banking introduction. Transitions ein_issued -> bank_pack_ready.
Mark the entity as fully formed and active. Transitions bank_pack_ready -> active.

get.description: Get the audit trail for a specific order, newest first.

schema.title: Response Get Audit Trail V1 Entity Orders  Order Id  Audit Get

post.description: Register a URL to receive entity status update notifications. Returns the registration with a signing secret for HMAC verification.

get.description: Returns the current status of a human kernel session. Used by the secure form to show which steps are pending.

post.description: Complete a step in the human kernel flow. On success, advances the session. When all steps complete, the order transitions to human_kernel_completed and a webhook fires.

get.description: Quick check whether the human owner has completed all required steps.

schema.title: Response Check Completion V1 Human Secure  Token  Status Get

endpoint.title: Endpoint
endpoint.description: API endpoint to call, if applicable

required.title: Required
required.description: Whether this action is mandatory to progress

ActionItem.title: ActionItem
ActionItem.description: Describes a single action the caller should (or must) take next.

authority_scope.title: Authority Scope
authority_scope.description: JSON object describing what the agent is authorised to do

AgentInput.title: AgentInput
AgentInput.description: An AI agent to register as part of the entity structure.

AuditEventResponse.title: AuditEventResponse
AuditEventResponse.description: An audit event for the trail endpoint.

kernel_url.title: Kernel Url
kernel_url.description: Secure URL for the human owner

token_prefix.title: Token Prefix
token_prefix.description: First 8 chars of the session token

suggested_message.title: Suggested Message
suggested_message.description: Message the agent can relay to the human owner

CreateKernelResponse.title: CreateKernelResponse
CreateKernelResponse.description: Response after creating a human kernel session.

members.title: Members
members.description: At least one member is required

metadata.title: Metadata
metadata.description: Arbitrary metadata to store with the order

url.title: Url
url.description: HTTPS URL to receive webhook POST requests

events.title: Events
events.description: Event types to subscribe to, e.g. ["order.state_changed", "order.completed", "filing.confirmed"]

DocumentSummary.title: DocumentSummary
DocumentSummary.description: Lightweight document info for list endpoints.

KernelSessionStatus.title: KernelSessionStatus
KernelSessionStatus.description: Status of a human kernel session.

role.title: Role
role.description: Role in the entity: member | manager | registered_agent | responsible_party

MemberInput.title: MemberInput
MemberInput.description: A natural person to associate with the entity order.

next_required_actions.title: Next Required Actions
next_required_actions.description: Actions the caller should take to advance the order

OrderResponse.title: OrderResponse
OrderResponse.description: Canonical representation of an entity order.

next_required_actions.description: Submit member/agent details to complete intake

OrderSummary.title: OrderSummary
OrderSummary.description: Lightweight order representation for list endpoints.

StateTransitionResponse.title: StateTransitionResponse
StateTransitionResponse.description: Response returned after a successful state transition.

StepResponse.title: StepResponse
StepResponse.description: Response after completing a kernel step.

step.title: Step
step.description: Step to complete: pii_collection | kyc_verification | document_signing | attestation

data.title: Data
data.description: Step-specific data (e.g., encrypted SSN for pii_collection)

StepSubmission.title: StepSubmission
StepSubmission.description: Payload for completing a kernel step.

UpdateNameRequest.title: UpdateNameRequest
UpdateNameRequest.description: Body for PATCH /{order_id} — update the requested entity name.
